intro: This archive contains 13 articles from April 12 to April 19, 2026, detailing law enforcement and cybercrime activity. The reports are dominated by high-severity incidents, with ten classified as high and three as medium. The threat actors W3LL and W3LL Team were prominently featured. Their operations impacted a range of sectors including government, corporate, cryptocurrency, education, and entertainment. Geographically, the affected regions centered on the United States, North America, Canada, and Europe, with specific activity noted in Florida.
